description: This pipeline loads an image via native ImageJ functions and adds data annotations that contain the image properties. The main steps include loading the image using import-imagej-imgplus-from-file node and then adding annotations using image-properties-to-annotation node.

550dacf6-c9df-4d7e-856b-c70daeb420c2.name: image-properties-to-annotation
550dacf6-c9df-4d7e-856b-c70daeb420c2.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

396f4183-84a8-4ec1-b261-7fdef9ecd5a0.name: import-imagej-imgplus-from-file
396f4183-84a8-4ec1-b261-7fdef9ecd5a0.description: Loads an image via the native ImageJ functions.

d9f290cd-6685-4a25-83c4-80dc6eac060f.name: ij1-color-split-channels-2
d9f290cd-6685-4a25-83c4-80dc6eac060f.description: Splits multichannel images into multiple greyscale images. This operation is applied for each 2D image slice.
